message:
chore: convert path deps to git deps for v0.2.0 release (closes #89)

Convert all sibling path dependencies to pinned git+rev references
so the GitHub Actions release workflow can build without local
filesystem access to ../franken*, ../asupersync, ../toon_rust, etc.

Key dependency pins:
- franken-agent-detection v0.1.2 (includes OpenCode SQLite fix 7c534b6)
- frankensqlite @ 68533b1
- frankensearch @ 8b319e9
- frankentui @ 18facd3
- asupersync @ d72f93e
- toon_rust @ bc3f9da

This unblocks the release that ships the OpenCode v1.2+ SQLite
connector fix to Homebrew users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
